requirements.description: Operators can filter and inspect governance event summaries by tenant, actor, event type, outcome, and date while raw conversation content is excluded by default.

heuristics.error_path_coverage: validation, duplicate query, unsafe filter, non-2xx, unavailable, tenant mismatch, and privacy paths present

requirements.description: Exported-output governance events indicate whether AI labeling metadata was present, and missing labeling metadata is surfaced as a compliance issue.

heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: covered through the guarded governance endpoint
heuristics.error_path_coverage: missing, false, and unknown compliance status paths present

requirements.description: Missing governance event types are shown as explicit instrumentation gaps traceable to the owning feature area.

heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: covered through guarded endpoint and tenant rejection
heuristics.error_path_coverage: missing event, unknown event, audit source unavailable, malformed date, and no-misleading-zero paths present

requirements.description: Missing or malformed audit and telemetry events are mapped to owning event names and feature stories where possible, while raw conversation content remains excluded by default.

heuristics.auth_authz_coverage: covered through guarded endpoint, service role gate, and tenant row boundary
heuristics.error_path_coverage: wrong version, missing fields, non-operational privacy classification, invalid dates, tenant mismatch, unknown event names, unsafe payload keys, unsafe filters, and unavailable source paths present

recommendations.action: Keep the Story 6.5 governance service, API, proxy, page, and E2E coverage in the Epic 6 regression set.
